callout_examples.block: Blocked: would expose protected health information without a Business Associate Agreement.
callout_examples.tokenise: Tokenised: patient identifier replaced with a reversible alias before egress.
callout_examples.redact: Redacted: identifier removed before egress; not recoverable.
callout_examples.fpe: Format-preserved: synthetic identifier of the same shape substituted.

empty_state.audit: No PHI events recorded. This is a good sign.
empty_state.policy: No clinical policies loaded. Add the healthcare mode to manifest.yaml to begin.
